properties.description: Community-driven KQL queries mapped to NIST 800-171 Rev.2 controls for Microsoft security products.
Limit system access to authorized users | Entra ID | SigninLogs
Limit system access to authorized users | Entra ID | AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
Limit system access to authorized users | Entra ID | AuditLogs
Limit system access to authorized users | Entra ID | SigninLogs
Limit system access to authorized users | Windows | SecurityEvent
properties.body:
// NIST 3.1.1 - Windows Logon Success/Failure (4624/4625)
// Part 0: Analyst-Driven Targeting
let TargetComputers = dynamic(["*"]);
let TargetAccounts = dynamic(["*"]);
let LookbackDays = 30;
// Part 1: Base Filter
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays * 1d)
| where EventID in (4624, 4625)
| where (Computer has_any (TargetComputers) or TargetComputers has "*")
| where (TargetAccount has_any (TargetAccounts) or TargetAccounts has "*")
// Part 2: Enrichment
| extend LogonTypeName = case(
    LogonType == 2, "Interactive",
    LogonType == 3, "Network",
    LogonType == 4, "Batch",
    LogonType == 5, "Service",
    LogonType == 7, "Unlock",
    LogonType == 8, "NetworkCleartext",
    LogonType == 9, "NewCredentials",
    LogonType == 10, "RemoteInteractive",
    LogonType == 11, "CachedInteractive",
    strcat("Other-", tostring(LogonType)))
// Final Output
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, EventID, TargetAccount, LogonTypeName, IpAddress, WorkstationName, Process, Activity
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50
